Show / Hide Table of Contents

Interface IToolTipFactory

Provides methods to create tooltip-related objects and access the default tooltip controller used across the application.

This interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.ToolTips
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IToolTipFactory
Remarks

An instance of IToolTipFactory can be accessed via ToolTipFactory property.

Properties

DefaultController

Gets the default tooltip controller used to display tooltips across the application.

Declaration
IToolTipController DefaultController { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IToolTipController

An instance of IToolTipController that manages the appearance and behavior of tooltips by default.
Remarks

The default controller ensures a consistent look and behavior for tooltips across all controls.

If specific controls require different tooltip behavior or appearance, create a separate controller using the CreateController() method and customize it as needed.

Methods

CreateControlInfo()

Creates a new tooltip control information object.

Declaration
IToolTipControlInfo CreateControlInfo()
Returns
Type Description
IToolTipControlInfo

A new instance of IToolTipControlInfo.
Remarks

This object provides tooltip data for a specific control and is typically returned by the GetToolTipInfo(Control, Point) method.

CreateController()

Creates a new tooltip controller.

Declaration
IToolTipController CreateController()
Returns
Type Description
IToolTipController

A new instance of IToolTipController.
Remarks

Use this method when you need a tooltip controller with custom behavior or styling that differs from the default controller.

CreateToolTip()

Creates a new rich tooltip instance.

Declaration
IRichToolTip CreateToolTip()
Returns
Type Description
IRichToolTip

A new instance of IRichToolTip.
Remarks

A rich tooltip can contain multiple items such as text, images, titles, and separators to build a structured tooltip layout.
